nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Variegated fairywren
nodes.summary: Variegated fairywren（Variegated fairywren，学名 Malurus lamberti），常见栖息地包括灌丛。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The variegated fairywren is found in scrubland with plenty of vegetation providing dense cover. They have been reported to shelter in mammal burrows to avoid extreme heat.{{cite journal |author=Marchant S |year=1992 |title= A bird observatory at Moruya, N.S.W
